02086|   const loadUserStreak = () => {
02087|     if (!address) return
02088|     
02089|     const streak = secureStorage.getItem<UserStreak>(`streak_${address}`)
02090|     if (streak) {
02091|       const now = Date.now()
02092|       const timeSinceLastSwap = now - streak.lastSwapTimestamp
02093|       const twentyFourHours = 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000
02094|       
02095|       if (timeSinceLastSwap > twentyFourHours) {
02096|         const updated = {
02097|           ...streak,
02098|           currentStreak: 0,
02099|         }
02100|         secureStorage.setItem(`streak_${address}`, updated)
02101|         setUserStreak(updated)
02102|       } else {
02103|         setUserStreak(streak)
02104|       }
02105|     }
02106|   }

02108|   const updateUserStreak = () => {
02109|     if (!address) return
02110|     
02111|     const now = Date.now()
02112|     const current = secureStorage.getItem<UserStreak>(`streak_${address}`) || { currentStreak: 0, lastSwapTimestamp: 0, totalSwaps: 0 }
02113|     
02114|     const timeSinceLastSwap = now - current.lastSwapTimestamp
02115|     const twentyFourHours = 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000
02116|     
02117|     const lastSwapDate = new Date(current.lastSwapTimestamp)
02118|     const currentDate = new Date(now)
02119|     const isSameDay = lastSwapDate.getFullYear() === currentDate.getFullYear() &&
02120|                       lastSwapDate.getMonth() === currentDate.getMonth() &&
02121|                       lastSwapDate.getDate() === currentDate.getDate()
02122|     
02123|     let newStreak = current.currentStreak
02124|     let showStreakMessage = false
02125|     
02126|     if (current.lastSwapTimestamp === 0) {
02127|       newStreak = 1
02128|       showStreakMessage = true
02129|     } else if (isSameDay) {
02130|       newStreak = current.currentStreak
02131|       showStreakMessage = false
02132|     } else if (timeSinceLastSwap <= twentyFourHours) {
02133|       newStreak = current.currentStreak + 1
02134|       showStreakMessage = true
02135|     } else {
02136|       newStreak = 1
02137|       showStreakMessage = true
02138|     }
02139|     
02140|     const updated = {
02141|       currentStreak: newStreak,
02142|       lastSwapTimestamp: now,
02143|       totalSwaps: current.totalSwaps + 1,
02144|     }
02145|     
02146|     secureStorage.setItem(`streak_${address}`, updated)
02147|     setUserStreak(updated)
02148|     
02149|     if (showStreakMessage && newStreak > 1) {

02447|     if (!address || !revokeChain || selectedApprovals.size === 0) return
02448|     setIsRevoking(true)

02457|       const selectedApprovalsArray = Array.from(selectedApprovals).map(idx => approvals[idx])
02458|       let successCount = 0
